mapper.select: SELECT sr_latest.id, sr_latest.course_id, c.title AS course_title, c.cover_url, COALESCE( (SELECT ROUND(AVG(sr_inner.progress)) FROM study_record sr_inner WHERE sr_inner.student_id = #{studentId} AND sr_inner.course_id = sr_latest.course_id), 0 ) AS overall_progress, ch.title AS current_chapter, cv.title AS current_video, sr_latest.video_id AS current_video_id, sr_latest.last_position, sr_latest.updated_at FROM study_record sr_latest INNER JOIN ( SELECT course_id, MAX(updated_at) AS max_updated FROM study_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY course_id ) latest ON sr_latest.course_id = latest.course_id AND sr_latest.updated_at = latest.max_updated AND sr_latest.student_id = #{studentId} LEFT JOIN course c ON sr_latest.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN course_video cv ON sr_latest.video_id = cv.id LEFT JOIN course_chapter ch ON cv.chapter_id = ch.id ORDER BY sr_latest.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
